name: G-9 sync with operator registries: pr-source-add source_class gold-standard-process routes to linux-foundation/ per §17 G-9
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-source-add.sh" --github acme/repo --id lf-pr --source-class gold-standard-process --tree "$PWD/tree" 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && [ -s tree/linux-foundation/lf-pr.yaml ] && echo gold_routed 1>&2
